sections.content_assessed: In aceasta sesiune ai aratat ca ai o baza buna in limba romana. Vocabularul tau acopera situatiile de zi cu zi. Problemele principale au aparut in sistemul de cazuri si in utilizarea timpurilor verbale.
sections.content_native: In this session you showed that you have a good foundation in Romanian. Your vocabulary covers everyday situations. The main problems appeared in the case system and in the use of verb tenses.

items.strength_native: Good use of present simple tense
items.example_assessed: "Eu merg la școală în fiecare zi." — Conjugarea corectă și context clar.
items.example_native: "I go to school every day." — Correct conjugation and clear context.

items.example_assessed: Folosești cuvinte pentru mâncare, transport, casă, și activități zilei — "masa de prânz", "autobuz", "dormitor".
items.example_native: You use words for food, transport, house, and daily activities — "lunch", "bus", "bedroom".

items.strength_assessed: Formarea corectă a unor întrebări simple
items.strength_native: Correct formation of some simple questions
items.example_assessed: "Unde locuiești?" și "Cât costă?" — Intonație și structură adecvate.
items.example_native: "Where do you live?" and "How much does it cost?" — Appropriate intonation and structure.

sections.content_assessed: Problema centrala este articolul postpus si sistemul de cazuri. In romana, articolul se pune dupa substantiv ('omul' nu 'om-ul'), iar cazurile genitiv si dativ au forme speciale.
sections.content_native: The central problem is the postposed article and the case system. In Romanian, the article is placed after the noun ('omul' not 'om-ul'), and the genitive and dative cases have special forms.

items.explanation_assessed: Nu folosesti corect articolul postpus: 'un om' (nehotarat) vs. 'omul' (hotarat).
items.explanation_native: You are not using the postposed article correctly: 'un om' (indefinite) vs. 'omul' (definite).
items.evidence_assessed: "Am vazut om pe strada." → Corect: "Am vazut un om pe strada." sau "Am vazut omul pe strada."
items.evidence_native: "Am vazut om pe strada." → Correct: "Am vazut un om pe strada." or "Am vazut omul pe strada."

items.explanation_assessed: Confuzi formele de genitiv-dativ: 'cartea lui Ion' (genitiv) vs. 'ii dau cartea lui Ion' (dativ).
items.explanation_native: You confuse the genitive-dative forms: 'cartea lui Ion' (genitive) vs. 'ii dau cartea lui Ion' (dative).
items.evidence_assessed: "Cartea de fratele meu" → Corect: "Cartea fratelui meu."
items.evidence_native: "Cartea de fratele meu" → Correct: "Cartea fratelui meu."

items.explanation_assessed: Confuzi perfectul compus cu imperfectul: 'Am mers' (actiune unica) vs. 'Mergeam' (obisnuinta).
items.explanation_native: You confuse the perfect compound with the imperfect: 'Am mers' (one-time action) vs. 'Mergeam' (habit).
items.evidence_assessed: "Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal." → Corect: "Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal."
items.evidence_native: "Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal." → Correct: "Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal."

items.explanation_assessed: Uiti pronumele atone care sunt obligatorii in romana: 'I-am dat cartea' nu 'Am dat cartea lui'.
items.explanation_native: You forget the clitic pronouns, which are mandatory in Romanian: 'I-am dat cartea' not 'Am dat cartea lui'.
items.evidence_assessed: "Am dat cartea la Ion." → Corect: "I-am dat cartea lui Ion."
items.evidence_native: "Am dat cartea la Ion." → Correct: "I-am dat cartea lui Ion."

items.original_assessed: Gresit: Am vazut om pe strada.
items.original_native: Wrong: Am vazut om pe strada.
items.corrected_assessed: Corect: Am vazut un om pe strada.
items.corrected_native: Correct: Am vazut un om pe strada.
items.explanation_assessed: Substantivul singular are nevoie de articol.

items.original_assessed: Gresit: Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal.
items.original_native: Wrong: Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal.
items.corrected_assessed: Corect: Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal.
items.corrected_native: Correct: Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal.

items.explanation_native: 'la' = towards a person. 'in' = inside a place.

items.original_assessed: Gresit: Am dat cartea la Ion.
items.original_native: Wrong: Am dat cartea la Ion.
items.corrected_assessed: Corect: I-am dat cartea lui Ion.
items.corrected_native: Correct: I-am dat cartea lui Ion.

items.action_assessed: In fiecare zi 5 propozitii cu articol hotarat si nehotarat. Pronunta cu voce tare.
items.action_native: Every day 5 sentences with definite and indefinite articles. Say them aloud.

items.action_assessed: Memoreaza formele de genitiv ale celor mai comune substantive.
items.action_native: Memorize the genitive forms of the most common nouns.

items.action_assessed: 3 perechi pe zi: aceeasi situatie, o data la perfect compus, o data la imperfect.
items.action_native: 3 pairs per day: the same situation, once in perfect compound, once in imperfect.
items.result_native: The distinction becomes automatic within 3 weeks.

items.action_assessed: Exerseaza: 'ii dau', 'i-am dat', 'o vad', 'l-am vazut'. 3 propozitii pe zi.
items.action_native: Practice: 'ii dau', 'i-am dat', 'o vad', 'l-am vazut'. 3 sentences per day.

sections.explanation_assessed: In fiecare zi pronunta cu voce tare 5 propozitii, alegand constient cazul corect.
sections.explanation_native: Every day say aloud 5 sentences, consciously choosing the correct case.

patterns.native: I gave the book to Ion. (dative)

patterns.de: Am vazut omul pe strada. (articol hotarat)
patterns.native: I saw the man on the street. (definite article)

sections.daily_instruction_assessed: 5 propozitii pe zi, cu voce tare, cu caz constient.
sections.daily_instruction_native: 5 sentences per day, aloud, with conscious case selection.

sentences.de: Merg la magazin pentru ca am nevoie de paine.
sentences.native: I'm going to the store because I need bread.

sentences.de: Ieri am citit o carte interesanta.
sentences.native: Yesterday I read an interesting book.
I gave my friend the book.
We live in a big city.

sentences.de: Ea merge la scoala in fiecare zi.
sentences.native: She goes to school every day.
I wrote a letter to mom.
I see a big house.
She goes to school.
We live in Bucharest.
I gave the book to my friend.
Yesterday I wrote a letter.
He is reading an interesting book.

items.wrong_assessed: Gresit: Am vazut om pe strada.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Am vazut om pe strada.
items.right_assessed: Corect: Am vazut un om pe strada.
items.right_native: Correct: Am vazut un om pe strada.

items.wrong_assessed: Gresit: Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Cand am fost mic, am jucat fotbal.
items.right_assessed: Corect: Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal.
items.right_native: Correct: Cand eram mic, jucam fotbal.

items.wrong_assessed: Gresit: Am dat cartea la Ion.
items.wrong_native: Wrong: Am dat cartea la Ion.
items.right_assessed: Corect: I-am dat cartea lui Ion.
items.right_native: Correct: I-am dat cartea lui Ion.

sentences.assessed: Ieri am mers la piață cu mama.
sentences.native: Yesterday I went to the market with my mother.

sentences.assessed: Am cumpărat legume proaspete și brânză.
sentences.native: I bought fresh vegetables and cheese.

sentences.assessed: Apoi am mers acasă și am făcut cina.
sentences.native: Then I went home and made dinner.

sentences.assessed: Familia mea a venit pentru a mânca împreună.
sentences.native: My family came to eat together.

sentences.assessed: Am servit salată, mâncare și pâine caldă.
sentences.native: I served salad, main course, and warm bread.

sentences.assessed: Toată lumea a mâncat cu plăcere și a vorbit despre ziua lor.
sentences.native: Everyone ate with pleasure and talked about their day.

sentences.assessed: După cină, am ieșit în grădină pentru o plimbare.
sentences.native: After dinner, we went out to the garden for a walk.

sentences.assessed: Vremea era frumoasă și soarele se asundase ușor.
sentences.native: The weather was beautiful and the sun had set gently.

sentences.assessed: Am vorbit cu vecinii mei despre plantele din grădină.
sentences.native: I talked with my neighbors about the plants in the garden.

sentences.assessed: Deși eram obosit, m-am simțit fericit și relaxat.
sentences.native: Although I was tired, I felt happy and relaxed.

weeks.goal_assessed: Articole si forme de genitiv corecte
Perfect compus vs. imperfect + prepozitii corecte
weeks.goal_native: Perfect compound vs. imperfect + correct prepositions
weeks.daily_assessed: 3 perechi de timpuri + 3 propozitii cu prepozitii

weeks.goal_assessed: Pronume atone corecte in vorbirea spontana
weeks.goal_native: Correct clitic pronouns in spontaneous speech

weeks.daily_assessed: Monolog de 2 minute cu focus constient

sections.goal_assessed: Consolidarea reflexelor de caz și timp verbal sub presiunea vorbirii
sections.goal_native: Consolidate case and verb tense reflexes under speaking pressure
sections.step1_assessed: Zilnic pronunță 5 perechi de propoziții cu prepoziții de loc — "în", "pe", "la" — schimbând cazul (nominativ, acuzativ, genitiv, dativ). Pronunță conscious și atenție la terminații.
sections.step1_native: Daily pronounce 5 pairs of sentences with prepositions of location — "în", "pe", "la" — changing the case (nominative, accusative, genitive, dative). Pronounce consciously and pay attention to endings.
sections.step2_assessed: Un monolog de 2 minute despre locul tău de muncă sau școală. Folosește deliberat prepoziții de loc și timpuri verbale diferite (prezent și trecut). Înregistrează-te. Ascultă. Repetă până se pare natural.
sections.step2_native: A 2-minute monologue about your workplace or school. Deliberately use location prepositions and different verb tenses (present and past). Record yourself. Listen. Repeat until it sounds natural.

cefr_footer.summary_assessed: Te afli la nivelul A2. Baza ta exista, dar articolele si cazurile sunt instabile. Cu antrenament tintit, B1 este realist in 4-5 luni.
cefr_footer.summary_native: You are at level A2. Your base is in place, but articles and cases are unstable. With targeted training, B1 is realistic within 4-5 months.
cefr_footer.stability_native: Structural stability under pressure: low to medium

block_d.cefr_summary_native: Your active spoken Romanian is at level A2.1. You can manage in simple everyday situations, but articles and cases break down under pressure.
top_problems_native: Postposed article: omitted or wrong form
Perfect compound instead of imperfect for habits
Prepositions of place: confusion of in/la/pe
block_d.key_recommendation_native: Practice the Case Engine daily: say 5 sentences aloud with correct articles and cases.
block_d.next_steps_native: Focus on articles and cases for the next 2 weeks. Schedule a reassessment in 3 months.
